commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a `toolsEnabled` guard before embedded runtime tool construction for `compat.supportsTools: false` models and adds a regression test asserting the tool factory is skipped.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +15. Total +16 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main derives `toolsEnabled` from `supportsModelTools` but still allows `shouldConstructTools` to call the runtime tool factory for no-tool models. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No narrow automated repair is needed; maintainers should decide whether the focused regression plus Crabbox changed gate are enough for this draft performance change.
